title: Supply side issues push global gas prices higher
section_path: Supply side issues push global gas prices higher
section_path_text: Supply side issues push global gas prices higher
summary:
Main
Mixed signals on the outlook for monetary policy saw commodity markets trade sideways. However, ongoing supply side issues remain supportive. By Daniel Hynes
Crude oil steadied following strong gains earlier in the week following reports Russia will dial back output.
